navigation.aiGeneratorDescription: Generate exams automatically with artificial intelligence

footer.description: ProfeVision is the comprehensive platform for educators. Automates exam creation and grading with AI and OMR technology, allowing you to scan and correct paper tests instantly with your mobile. Additionally, it centralizes complete management of institutions, subjects, groups, and students. Save time, optimize educational evaluation, and get precise insights for more effective teaching. It's your definitive tool to transform academic management.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Discover how ProfeVision simplifies exam creation, grading, and management in just a few steps
howItWorks.stepsTitle: 4 Simple Steps to Transform Your Teaching
howItWorks.stepsDescription: Follow our intuitive process to create, apply, and grade exams efficiently

step1.title: Create Your Exams
step1.description: Use our AI-powered tools to generate questions or create them manually. Choose from multiple formats and customize according to your needs.

step2.title: Apply to Students
step2.description: Print personalized formats for each student with unique QR codes. Assign digital exams or distribute physical answer sheets.

step3.title: Scan and Grade
step3.description: Use your smartphone to scan answer sheets. Our OMR technology automatically processes responses and calculates grades instantly.

step4.title: Analyze Results
step4.description: Access detailed reports on student performance, identify improvement areas, and make data-driven educational decisions.

howItWorks.ctaDescription: Join thousands of educators who are already saving time and improving their students' results.

hero.title: Create and grade exams in
hero.subtitle: The fastest and most modern way to evaluate your students
hero.description: Would you like to create exams in minutes and grade them in seconds? With ProfeVision you can do it. Our platform is designed for teachers and schools looking to save time and get accurate results. Create exams with artificial intelligence, upload your tests in PDF and automatically grade by scanning printed answer sheets with your phone. Plus, organize everything by institutions, subjects and classes, and access a dashboard with detailed results metrics.

features.title: What can you do with ProfeVision?

feature1.title: 1. Create exams with AI or upload your tests in PDF

item1.title: Generate exams automatically:
item1.description: Use our artificial intelligence to create personalized exams in seconds. Choose from multiple choice, open-ended, or mixed questions.

item2.title: Upload your exams in PDF:
item2.description: If you already have your tests ready, simply upload them to the platform. No need to transcribe anything.

item1.title: Scan printed answer sheets:
item1.description: Print answer sheets, apply them in class and then scan them with your phone using our Computer Vision (OMR) technology. Get grades instantly, error-free and without manual effort.

item2.title: Automatic and accurate results:
item2.description: Forget about reviewing sheet by sheet. ProfeVision delivers results in seconds and organizes them automatically.

feature3.title: 3. Organize everything by institutions, subjects and classes

item1.title: Create your institution:
item1.description: Register your school, academy or educational center in just a few steps.

item2.title: Add subjects and classes:
item2.description: Organize your exams and results by subject and group. This way you'll have everything organized and easy to find.

item3.title: Dashboard with metrics:
item3.description: Visualize your students' performance with clear charts and reports. Analyze results by class, subject or period and make better decisions.

timeSaving.title: Save time
timeSaving.description: Create and grade exams in minutes.

accuracy.title: Accurate results
accuracy.description: Eliminate human errors with automatic grading.

organization.title: Total organization
organization.description: Keep your exams and results organized by institution, subject and class.

accessibility.title: Access from any device
accessibility.description: Work from your computer or phone.

analytics.title: Advanced analytics
analytics.description: Visualize your students' progress with clear and useful metrics.

whyChoose.title: Why choose ProfeVision?
whyChoose.description: ProfeVision is the ideal tool for teachers and schools that want to modernize digital school evaluation. Our platform is easy to use, fast and reliable. Forget manual processes and take your exams to the next level with artificial intelligence and scanning technology.

q1.question: Can I use ProfeVision in any type of school?
q1.answer: Yes, the platform adapts to schools, academies and training centers of any size.

q2.question: Is automatic grading reliable?
q2.answer: Yes, our Computer Vision (OMR) technology guarantees fast and accurate results.

q3.question: Can I upload exams in PDF?
q3.answer: Of course. Just upload them to the platform and start grading.

q4.question: Do I need special equipment to scan answer sheets?
q4.answer: No, you only need your phone with the ProfeVision app.

q5.question: Is the platform secure?
q5.answer: Yes, we protect all your information with the highest security standards.

privacy.title: ProfeVision Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At ProfeVision (www.profevision.com), we take your privacy and that of your students very seriously. We want you to know how we use and protect your information when you use our application or website. Here we explain, in a simple and clear way, everything you need to know.

section1.title: 1. Who are we?
section1.content: We are ProfeVision, a platform that helps teachers grade multiple choice exams and analyze their students' results quickly and easily. You can use our app or website to manage your classes and exams.

section2.title: 2. What information do we collect?
section2.intro: We collect two types of information:

accountInfo.title: a) Your account and usage information
items: Email and password: To create your account and identify you.
Subscription data: If you have a paid subscription, we store the necessary information to manage it.
Usage data: We collect information about how you use ProfeVision, such as how often you log in, from which devices, your IP address, browser type, etc.
Cookies and similar technologies: We use cookies to make the platform work correctly and to improve your experience. We don't use them for advertising.

userInfo.title: b) Information you choose to enter
items: Your students' data: If you want, you can enter names, surnames, identification numbers and classes of your students.
Exams and results: When you grade exams, you can save images and results to analyze them later.
Your class information: You can create records of your classes and link them with your students.

section3.title: 3. What do we use your information for?
items: Provide you with ProfeVision's service and constantly improve it.
Respond to your questions or queries.
Customize the platform for you.
Send you important notices about your account, subscription or ProfeVision news.
section3.note: We never sell your information or use it to show you advertising.

section4.title: 4. Who do we share your information with?
section4.intro: We only share your information in these cases:
items: When you decide: For example, if you export results to another system.

With service providers: We work with companies that help us send emails, host our servers or provide technical support. These companies only use your information to help us and are obligated to protect it.
By legal obligation: If an authority requires it, we may share information to comply with the law or protect the rights of ProfeVision and its users.
In case of company changes: If ProfeVision is acquired or merges with another company, we will notify you and your information will continue to be protected under this policy.
With your consent: We will never share your information with third parties for other purposes without your permission.

section5.title: 5. How do we protect your information?
items: Your account is protected with your email and a password that only you know.
All information is transmitted and stored in encrypted form.
We constantly review and improve our security measures.
If a security breach ever occurs, we will notify you as soon as possible.

section6.title: 6. Can I decide what information to share?
items: You can use ProfeVision without syncing your data with our servers.
You can delete or edit your students', classes' and exams' information at any time.
If you want to delete your account and all your data, you can do so from the "My Account" section.

section7.title: 7. How long do we keep your information?
section7.content: If you delete data or your account, we will delete it from all our systems within a maximum of 60 days. If your account is inactive for a long time, we will also delete your data to protect your privacy.

section8.title: 8. What communications will I receive?
section8.content: We will send you emails only for important matters: security notices, information about your account, news or support. If you don't want to receive certain emails, you can let us know at any time.

section9.title: 9. Changes to this policy
section9.content: If we change something important in this policy, we will let you know by email and when you enter the app or website. You will always be able to consult the most updated version on our site.

section10.title: 10. Do you have questions or need help?
section10.content: If you have questions about your privacy or how we handle your data, write to us at info@profevision.com. We are here to help you.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: This policy explains how we use cookies on www.profevision.com to improve your browsing experience and the functioning of our website.

content.paragraph1: User shall be understood as any person who navigates the website www.profevision.com. Editor shall be understood as the owner of the website, who is ProfeVision and is identified in the terms and conditions.
content.paragraph2: The cookies used in the user's browser have been installed with their authorization. If at any time you wish to revoke this authorization, you may do so without any obstacle by consulting the "Deactivation or deletion of cookies" section.
content.paragraph3: The Editor is free to make changes to the website, so the user is advised to check this policy every time they access the website.

section2.title: Definition and Function of Cookies
section2.intro: Cookies are information that is stored in the user's browser to consult previous activity and remember certain data for future visits. They may also be called web beacons, pixels, bugs or trackers.

functions.title: Main functions:
items: Technical data and statistics
Profile personalization
Social media links
Personal preferences

notWhat.title: What they are NOT:
items: Viruses or malware
Spam or trojans
Spyware
Pop-up advertising

byEntity.title: According to the Entity that Manages Them
byEntity.ownDescription: Managed by ProfeVision from our own domain
byEntity.thirdPartyDescription: Managed by entities other than ProfeVision
byEntity.note: This website uses its own and third-party cookies.

byPurpose.title: According to their Purpose
byPurpose.technicalDescription: Allow operational management of the website
byPurpose.analysisDescription: Tracking and analysis of user behavior

byDuration.title: According to their Duration
byDuration.sessionDescription: Disappear when the browsing session ends

cookies.name: _Georgia_*
cookies.description: Google Analytics to store and count visits

cookies.name: _Georgia
cookies.description: Calculates visitor, session and campaign data

section5.title: Consequences of Deactivating Cookies
section5.warning: By deactivating cookies, you could experience the following limitations:
consequences: Products will not load in the store, preventing purchases from being completed
You will not be able to access the customer area or areas that require confirmation
Data cannot be collected to analyze and improve the website
You will not be able to share content on social networks
You will not be able to comment on the blog
Limitations in the use of social networks
Third-party advertising will not be displayed
Your browsing could be considered spam

section6.title: Deactivation or Deletion of Cookies
section6.intro: You can deactivate or delete cookies at any time, except those necessary for the website to function. This configuration must be done in each browser.

section7.title: Notices Related to Cookies
section7.warning: The Editor is not responsible for technical failures that you may encounter on the website or browser by incorrectly manipulating the deactivation or deletion of cookies.
section7.responsibility: You must verify the information about deactivation in the help section of your browser. You assume responsibility for deleting or deactivating cookies and the consequences that arise.

section8.title: Contact
section8.content: You can contact the Editor at any time through email: info@profevision.com

terms.title: ProfeVision Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Thank you for your interest in ProfeVision ("ProfeVision", "we", "our"), which offers services available at www.profevision.com and on our mobile applications. By using ProfeVision, you agree to these Terms and our Privacy Policy. Please read them carefully.

section1.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
section1.content: By creating an account, accessing or using ProfeVision, you agree to comply with these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you use ProfeVision on behalf of an educational institution or company, make sure you have the authority to accept these Terms on their behalf.

section2.title: 2. Who can use ProfeVision
items: You must be over 18 years old or have authorization from your parents/guardians and your educational institution.
If you represent an institution, you guarantee that you have permission to accept these Terms on its behalf.

section3.title: 3. Proper use of the service
section3.intro: By using ProfeVision, you commit to:
items: Provide real and updated information about yourself and your institution.
Not use ProfeVision for illegal, harmful, fraudulent, abusive activities or that violate the rights of others.
Not attempt to access other users' accounts or share your password.
Not use robots, scrapers or other automated means to collect information without permission.
Not overload, damage or interfere with the operation of ProfeVision.
Not impersonate other people or falsify your identity.
Not facilitate or encourage the violation of these Terms.
section3.warning: If you violate any of these rules, we may suspend or cancel your account.

section4.title: 4. Your information and privacy
items: When using ProfeVision, you can enter personal and student information.
You are the owner of that information.
You give us permission to use, store and process that information only to provide you with the service.
You can delete your information and your account at any time.
section4.privacyLink: Check our Privacy Policy to learn more about how we protect your data.

section5.title: 5. Using ProfeVision in educational institutions
section5.intro: If you are a teacher or staff member of an educational institution:
items: You guarantee that you have authorization to use ProfeVision with your students.
You comply with applicable privacy and data protection laws (such as FERPA in the US or LOPI in other countries).
section5.note: If your institution does not want student data to be stored on our servers, you can disable synchronization from your account.

section6.title: 6. Intellectual property
items: ProfeVision and its technology are protected by copyright and other laws.
You may not copy, modify, distribute, sell, decompile or use our technology or brand for other purposes without our permission.
Using ProfeVision does not give you rights over our intellectual property.

section7.title: 7. Changes to Terms
section7.content: We may update these Terms to reflect changes in law or our services. We will notify you of important changes. If you continue to use ProfeVision after the changes, it will be considered that you accept them. If you disagree, you can stop using the service and delete your account.

section8.title: 8. Experimental features
section8.content: Sometimes we test new features that may change or disappear without prior notice. We do not guarantee that they will always work.

section9.title: 9. Limitation of liability
items: ProfeVision is offered "as is", without guarantees that it will always be available or error-free.
We are not responsible for indirect damages, data loss or any damage arising from the use or inability to use ProfeVision.
Our maximum responsibility to you will not exceed the amount you have paid for the service in the last 12 months or $100 USD, whichever is greater.

section10.title: 10. Security and registration
items: You must keep your password safe and not share your account.
If you detect unauthorized use of your account, notify us immediately at info@profevision.com.

section11.title: 11. Indemnification
section11.content: If someone makes a claim against ProfeVision related to your use of the service, you agree to defend us and cover any expense or damage this causes.

section12.title: 12. Account cancellation
section12.content: You can cancel your account at any time from the "My Account" section or by writing to us at info@profevision.com. We may also suspend or cancel your account if you violate these Terms.

section13.title: 13. Dispute resolution
section13.content: If a conflict arises between you and ProfeVision, we will try to resolve it in good faith. If this is not possible, any dispute will be resolved through arbitration in Chicago, Illinois, under the rules of the American Arbitration Association (AAA).
section13.waiver: By accepting these Terms, you waive the right to a jury trial or to participate in class action lawsuits.

section14.title: 14. Miscellaneous
items: If any part of these Terms is invalid, the rest remains in effect.
You may not transfer your account without our permission.
These Terms constitute the complete agreement between you and ProfeVision.

section15.title: 15. Contact
section15.content: If you have questions or need help, write to us at info@profevision.com or to:
